working_on: Routine task P5-04b: Ethics applied seed — seventh routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; pre-split b-half (P5-04a metaethics+normative was the a-half) per phase_5.md T1-B with depends_on [P5-01a, P5-04a] satisfied (P5-04a closed at S-0058). Author 0026_seed_ethics_part1.sql with ~25-30 applied-ethics nodes covering bioethics (medical / research / end-of-life / reproductive), environmental ethics (anthropocentrism / biocentrism / ecocentrism / deep ecology / animal ethics / climate ethics / future generations / intergenerational justice), and applied moral problems (just war / pacifism / business / technology and AI ethics). Within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges only (~30-40); cross-domain bridges to deontic_logic, free_will, distributive justice (P5-05), philosophy of science on naturalistic ethics + climate science, philosophy of mind on personal identity, philosophy of language on speech acts / consent deferred to P5-11. Apply via Supabase MCP; verify with engine/tools/validate.py.
declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0026_seed_ethics_part1.sql with ~25-30 nodes across applied ethics layers: (1) Bioethics (~9-11: bioethics umbrella, medical_ethics, four_principles_bioethics, autonomy_bioethical, beneficence, non_maleficence, justice_bioethical, informed_consent, research_ethics, end_of_life_ethics, reproductive_ethics); (2) Environmental ethics (~9-11: environmental_ethics umbrella, anthropocentrism, biocentrism, ecocentrism, deep_ecology, animal_ethics, sentientism, climate_ethics, future_generations, intergenerational_justice, non_identity_problem); (3) Applied moral problems (~6-9: just_war_theory, pacifism, business_ethics, technology_ethics, ai_ethics). Plus ~30-40 within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges. Append per-session narrative entry to product/seed-graph/migrations/ROUTING.md (one entry per S-0059). Apply migration via Supabase MCP apply_migration (single call if body fits; chunked-execute_sql + apply_migration marker pattern from S-0058 if not). Run engine/tools/validate.py with venv Python so live graph audit engages. Confidence_level composition target: 100% INTERPRETED (mirrors prior 6 P5 sessions). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited. Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11. Sub-range slots 0027-0029 left reserved. Two-commit pattern continued. End state: P5-04b complete; check_target.py --task-id P5-04b passes both criteria. graph_version 7→8. phase: P_5
outcome_summary: Phase 5 ethics applied seed (P5-04b) lands at S-0059. 28 nodes + 34 edges across three layers: foundation umbrella applied_ethics (1); bioethics (11) covering bioethics, medical_ethics, research_ethics, end_of_life_ethics (Quinlan/Cruzan/Rachels/Foot 1967 double-effect/Brock 1992), reproductive_ethics (Thomson 1971 violinist/Marquis 1989/Warren 1973/SisterSong reproductive justice), four_principles_bioethics (Beauchamp & Childress 1979 with common-morality grounding), autonomy_bioethical, beneficence, non_maleficence, justice_bioethical, informed_consent (Salgo 1957/Canterbury 1972/five-component framework); environmental ethics (11) covering environmental_ethics, anthropocentrism (strong + weak/Norton 1991), biocentrism (Schweitzer/Taylor 1986), ecocentrism (Leopold 1949/Callicott/Regan environmental-fascism critique), deep_ecology (Naess 1973 eight-point platform/Earth First!/Bookchin critique), animal_ethics (Singer 1975 utilitarian/Regan 1983 deontological/Hursthouse 2006 virtue/Donovan & Adams 2007 care/Nussbaum 2006 capabilities/Donaldson & Kymlicka 2011 ZOOPOLIS), sentientism (Bentham 1789/Singer 1975), climate_ethics (Gardiner 2011/Shue/Jamieson 2014), future_generations (longtermism/repugnant-conclusion/asymmetry), intergenerational_justice (Rawls 1971 just savings/capabilities/sufficientarian/prioritarian), non_identity_problem (Parfit 1984 ch. 16); applied moral problems (5) covering just_war_theory (Augustine/Aquinas/Walzer 1977/McMahan 2009; jus ad bellum + jus in bello + jus post bellum + jus ad vim), pacifism (absolute + contingent + religious + deontological + consequentialist + non-violent-resistance-pragmatism), business_ethics (Friedman 1970 shareholder vs Freeman 1984 stakeholder/CSR/ESG), technology_ethics (Heidegger/Mumford/Ellul/Wiener 1950/Floridi/engineering ethics), ai_ethics (Wallach & Allen 2009/Russell 2019/Bostrom 2014; near-term-fairness vs alignment vs existential-risk strands; OECD/EU/US governance). 6-tier layered DAG; 28/28 INTERPRETED (mirrors prior 6 P5 sessions); within-domain edges only. Within-ethics cross-references back into P5-04a's metaethics+normative-theory inventory deliberately deferred to P5-11 (autonomy_bioethical → kantian_ethics; informed_consent → deontology; future_generations → contractualism; business_ethics → consequentialism + deontology; supererogation → pacifism; virtue_ethics → practical_wisdom in bioethical judgment) — differs from P5-01b/P5-02b precedents because the dense P5-04a normative-theory layer would have produced denser cross-references than within-cluster substructure. graph_version 7→8. Migration applied via chunked execute_sql (UPDATE settings; INSERT 14 nodes; INSERT 14 nodes; INSERT 34 edges) + apply_migration marker call (no-op SELECT 1 body) recording the migration name in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations — body too large for single-call apply_migration (~94 KB executable). Pre-apply awk-grep escape sweep clean. Live verification 188/240. check_target.py P5-04b both criteria PASS; validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 182 soft-warns (180 missing_rigor_score expected per phase_5.md T2-C; 2 issue_collision upstream MemPalace #1/#2). Two-commit pattern continued. Routine-boot-freshness FF'd 3 commits at boot per ADR 0052 (second non-test-fixture exercise) — eager-claim S-0058 + deliverable + close from parallel worktree sharp-clarke-93896d. 0 in-band Issues filed; 0 HANDOFF entries. Sub-range slots 0027-0029 left reserved. **In-band escalation finding (resolved by user)**: at eager-claim push step, harness denied `git push origin main` with 'Pushing the eager-claim commit directly to main bypasses pull request review (Git Push to Default Branch)'. Session halted; user diagnosed worktree was already at origin/main = 6cc6c52 (the eager-claim commit had already synced via implicit branch push); explicit main-push was unnecessary. Authorized continuation with manual approvals for deliverable + close pushes. Future routine sessions encountering same surface should verify `git rev-parse HEAD origin/main` post-eager-claim; if equal, proceed (state correct); if divergent, halt and write HANDOFF. Re-enabling routine loop without addressing the harness gate may produce repeated halts at this point. Forward state: P5-04b complete; ethics subdomain fully seeded for cross-bridge consumption at P5-11. Phase 5 progress: 7/16 tasks complete (P5-01a, P5-01b, P5-02a, P5-02b, P5-03, P5-04a, P5-04b); 7 routine sessions consumed of 18 max_sessions per phase_5.md T1-C.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was ~25-30 nodes / ~30-40 edges across the bioethics + environmental + applied-moral-problems layers; delivered 28 nodes and 34 edges, both inside the declared range. Cluster decomposition: 1 foundation (applied_ethics) + 11 bioethics + 11 environmental + 5 applied-moral-problems = 28. PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in registry); ROUTING.md per-session narrative appended. Migration applied to paideia-dev via chunked execute_sql + apply_migration marker (whole-body apply_migration was infeasible due to MCP call payload size — ~94 KB executable SQL); final live count 188 nodes / 240 edges (delta +28/+34 matches the migration). graph_version 7→8 honored. confidence_level distribution 28/28 INTERPRETED matches phase_5.md T2-B 70% floor with margin. Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1. Within-ethics cross-references back into P5-04a (autonomy_bioethical → kantian_ethics; informed_consent → deontology; future_generations → contractualism; intergenerational_justice → contractualism; business_ethics → consequentialism + deontology; supererogation → pacifism) deliberately deferred to P5-11 — differs from P5-01b/P5-02b precedent; rationale documented in migration contract block + ROUTING entry (P5-04a's normative-theory layer is sufficiently dense that authoring those cross-cluster edges in this seed would have produced denser cross-references than within-cluster substructure; P5-11 is the natural surface). Pre-apply awk-grep escape-bug sweep clean (no unescaped apostrophes). check_target.py --task-id P5-04b passes both criteria. validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 182 soft-warns (180 missing_rigor_score expected per phase_5.md T2-C; 2 issue_collision upstream MemPalace #1/#2). Two-commit pattern continued (deliverable 4f17824 + close) per S-0053/S-0054/S-0056/S-0057/S-0058 finding. Sub-range slots 0027-0029 left reserved. In-band escalation at eager-claim push (harness-denied push-to-main) resolved by user via diagnosis that worktree was already at origin/main — explicit main-push was unnecessary; user authorized continuation with manual approvals for deliverable + close pushes. user_confirmed_changes=true reflects the explicit user authorization at the escalation point.
scope_delivery.harness_push_denial_finding: git push origin main was harness-denied with 'Pushing the eager-claim commit directly to main bypasses pull request review (Git Push to Default Branch)' at the eager-claim step. User diagnosed that origin/main was already at 6cc6c52 = the eager-claim commit (push had silently succeeded for the worktree branch sync; the explicit `push origin main` was unnecessary). Routine sessions should verify HEAD = origin/main post-eager-claim and proceed if equal.
